narrative_summary: - Session involved creating a custom Dagster `ApiAssetsComponent` in the `acme_co_dataeng` project
- Loaded reference docs via a subagent (Explore) reading `creating-components.md`, `resolved-framework.md`, `env-vars.md`, and `cli/scaffold/component.md`
- Explored the project structure at `/private/var/folders/.../acme_co_dataeng/` to understand the layout and `pyproject.toml`
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold component ApiAssetsComponent` to generate boilerplate component class
- `TimedeltaArgs` class (`dg.Model, dg.Resolvable`) with `days/hours/minutes/seconds` fields resolved into `datetime.timedelta` via a custom `Resolver`
- `build_defs()` that asserts `api_key == "test-token-123"`, merges `cluster_id` tag into each `AssetSpec`, and returns a no-op `@dg.multi_asset`
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold defs acme_co_dataeng.components.api_assets_component.ApiAssetsComponent api_assets` to scaffold the YAML instance
- Wrote `defs.yaml` with `api_key: "{{ env.TOKEN }}"` Jinja2 template, lifespan config, and three sample assets (`a`, `b`, `c`) with domain/tier tags
- Verified with `uv run dg list defs --json` that all three assets loaded correctly with `cluster_id` tag merged alongside their user-defined tags
